title: Os' Inverted Armor Trims
description:
Inverts the template for each armor trim so you can have more color on your armor! Trim is based on Netherite armor.

This pack includes a How-To for you to make your own trims based on the Netherite armor. Just erase what you DON'T want for your trims.
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis)

# What Does This Pack Do?

This pack inverts the template of your armor trims so there's more fun color on your armor! This pack keeps the vanilla designs, but it's your armor material that shows through instead of amethyst, redstone, copper, etc.

Additionally, this pack includes a How-To section for you to be able to make your own custom trim pack. It has 2 PNG files of Netherite armor with their colors already edited to be compatible for armor trim colors, since the vanilla styled armor won't work with the vanilla trim palette, which will only accept 8 swatches of color. All you need to do is use this pack as a template for file structuring, and edit the PNGs to your desired armor trim shapes. Erase what you DON'T want your trims to be. The files as they are now will color the entire piece of armor as amethyst, copper, redstone, etc.

Gold armor with amethyst trims, and the two new trims in redstone and emerald:
![Picture of the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/DJ8sAof.png)

[![Join our public server](https://i.ibb.co/6JJPnwb/ezgif-com-gif-maker-2.gif)](https://osland.store.playerlands.com/)

[![Get 25% off your first month with BisectHosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a68298ac-ecfb-4f1b-9057-5081d638948d.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis)

# Usage Rights
Using/modifying for personal use is allowed.

Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page.

Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute.

Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures.
